title: Add study streak tracking, session history, custom timer settings, motivational quotes, and statistics dashboard

requirements.text: Implement study streak tracking that counts consecutive days with at least one completed study session, storing streak data per user in the backend and displaying current streak count in the UI

quotes: Study Streak Tracking - Track consecutive days of study sessions

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores streak count and last session date per user Principal
Streak increments when user completes a session on a new calendar day
Streak resets to 1 if more than one day has passed since last session
Frontend displays current streak count prominently in the UI
Streak persists across browser sessions and app upgrades

requirements.text: Create session history feature that records all completed study sessions with timestamps and durations, storing them in the backend and displaying them in a chronological list in the frontend

quotes: Session History - See past study sessions and total time studied

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores each completed session with timestamp, duration, and session type (work/break)
Frontend displays sessions in reverse chronological order (newest first)
Each session entry shows date, time, duration, and type
Display total time studied across all sessions
Session history is filterable by date range or session type

requirements.text: Add custom timer settings that allow users to adjust work session and break durations, storing preferences per user in the backend and providing a settings UI in the frontend

quotes: Custom Timer Settings - Let users adjust work/break durations

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores work duration and break duration preferences per user
Frontend provides settings interface with input controls for work and break durations
Duration ranges are validated (minimum 1 minute, maximum 90 minutes)
Custom durations apply to new timer sessions immediately after saving
Settings persist across browser sessions
Default values remain 25 minutes for work and 5 minutes for breaks

requirements.text: Display daily motivational quotes that rotate and appear in the UI, with a curated collection of study-focused inspirational messages

quotes: Daily Motivational Quotes - Display inspirational quotes

acceptanceCriteria: Frontend maintains a collection of at least 30 study-focused motivational quotes
Display one random quote per day that remains consistent throughout the day
Quote appears in a dedicated section of the UI with appropriate styling
Quote changes at midnight local time
Quote display is visible to authenticated users

requirements.text: Create a study statistics dashboard with charts visualizing study patterns including daily study time, weekly trends, and session distribution over time periods

quotes: Study Statistics Dashboard - Charts showing study patterns

acceptanceCriteria: Backend provides aggregate statistics endpoints for daily, weekly, and monthly data
Frontend displays interactive charts showing study time trends over selectable periods
Dashboard shows total study time, average session length, and most productive time of day
Charts update in real-time as new sessions are completed
Dashboard is accessible via navigation and displays data only for authenticated users
Use a charting library compatible with React and the existing tech stack

constraints: Maintain existing Pomodoro timer functionality without breaking changes
Keep warm earthy color theme and minimal UI design consistent
Store all user data in the single-actor backend architecture
Session history must be queryable efficiently even with hundreds of sessions per user
nonGoals: Social features or sharing statistics with other users
Integration with external calendar or productivity tools
